channel.title: Digital Transformation on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Digital Transformation on MinWeb

item.title: The AI Paradox: Why Your Productivity Isn't Improving
item.description:
If you have a nagging sense of “innovation fatigue” lately, you aren’t alone. For years, you’ve been told that AI will revolutionize your workflow, double your output, and change the nature of your job. Yet, when you look at your to-do list, you’re still clicking, typing, and managing the same pile of tasks you had two years ago—often with the added “bonus” of fixing AI-generated errors.

If it feels like all that tech investment hasn’t made your life easier, the data finally has your back.

item.title: Why Gen Z Is Sabotaging Corporate AI Rollouts
item.description:
If you feel like your workplace has turned into a digital battlefield, you aren’t imagining things. Walk into any office or skim the Slack channels of a major corporation, and you’ll find a mess. Executives are shoving AI down everyone’s throats, while employees are either ignoring it, breaking it, or just plain exhausted by the whole charade.

Headlines are currently buzzing with a provocative claim: Gen Z workers are sabotaging AI rollouts because they fear being replaced. A 2026 report from Writer and Workplace Intelligence found that 44% of Gen Z workers admit to actively undermining their company’s AI strategy.
